arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe's latest dismal move laid bare by £470m Man Utd XI
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe has made the decision to hike ticket prices - removing kids' only tickets - which means fans are paying fortunes to watch a Manchester United side that have underwhelmed

arts.ttl: Man Utd Transfer News Today: Amorim’s €60m January TARGET, Gyokeres GREEN LIGHT, Juve TALKS
arts.sum: All the latest Manchester United transfer news, rumours and gossip, with Ruben Amorim chasing a €60m signing, positive news over Viktor Gyokeres and transfer talks with Juventus . Ruben Amorim is planning to sign Benfica centre-back Tomas Araujo for €60 million (£50m) during the January transfer window, according to a report from The Sun .

arts.ttl: The Verdict: Man Utd survive scare as Amorim focuses on positives
arts.sum: Anton Toloui reflects on Ruben Amorim's first victory as Manchester United head coach.

arts.ttl: Rasmus Hojlund gives Ruben Amorim verdict after receiving 'no days off' at Manchester United
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund scored twice against Bodo/Glimt and is enjoying life under Manchester United's new head coach.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim Tells Man Utd to Sign 'Elite' £50m Star
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim will tell Man Utd to sign Benfica star Tomas Araujo during talks with INEOS on Friday.

arts.ttl: Friday's Transfer Talk Update: Adam Wharton, Harry Amass, Luke Shaw
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Manchester United fans in agreement on best player vs Bodo/Glimt and Ruben Amorim hails him as the ‘future’
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim got his first taste of a packed Old Trafford crowd as Manchester United secured a 3-2 win against Bodo/Glimt in the UEFA Europa...

arts.ttl: When is FA Cup third round draw? Date, time, TV channel as Liverpool, Man Utd and Arsenal enter
arts.sum: Premier League and Championship sides are set to enter the FA Cup in the third round and Mirror Football brings you everything you need to know ahead of the draw

arts.ttl: Amorim admits anxiety despite first Man Utd win
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim says Manchester United are causing him to be "anxious" and "nervous" while the players get to grips with his tactical demands.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes shock admission after claiming first win since taking over as Man United boss from Erik ten Hag and hails 'special' Old Trafford fans for 'making me feel at home'
arts.sum: United secured a crucial 3-2 win over Bodo/Glimt in the Europa League for just their second victory in the campaign, but perhaps more importantly, it was the first of the Amorim era at Old Trafford.
